label: Gate
description: Forwards value when pass is true; closes the output when pass is null or false (downstream sees a structural closure, not a data null).

inputs.name: pass
inputs.description: true to forward value, null or false to cut flow

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value to forward when pass is true

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: The forwarded value; the port is closed when pass was null or false
